invalidated_claim.reason: The replay matrix directly materialized revealed answers as training ranks. It proves answer-aligned reconstruction only, not that the frozen revised method independently selects those answers without answer access.

classification.DEV-EXAMPLE-002-Q4: Contains sexual-orientation wording; retain as an opaque fixed benchmark option, but prohibit promotion into a general rule that astrology determines sexual orientation and prohibit formal exact assertion.
classification.DEV-EXAMPLE-005-Q2: Historical school-discipline event involving alleged intimate behavior; not a reason to exclude the whole question.
classification.DEV-EXAMPLE-005-Q5: Relationship/personality wording such as 风流 and 女人缘; not automatically a protected-trait inference and not a reason to exclude the whole question.

allowed_inputs: calendar and regional facts allowed by the source rules
execution_requirements: Independent answer-isolated runtime or fresh model context with no answer memory
Each question creates answer-free blind models for Ziwei and Bazi before option selection
Four-option questions create all six pairwise comparisons
TOP1, TOP2, confidence, strongest competitor and evidence ledger are frozen before reveal
Five option-order perturbation runs are performed without answer access
Only after all prediction artifacts are frozen may the answer vault reveal the answer vector

current_session_limitation.reason: This conversation and its current runtime have already seen all five answer vectors and post-reveal rankings. Re-answering here cannot be represented as blind or answer-isolated.
